debug_info.goal:
α nt : Type
G : ContextFreeGrammar α nt
u v : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
cfd : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u v
h_not_same : u ≠ v
u' : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z })
dstep : G.ContextFreeDerivationStep u
derivation : ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation α nt G u' v
sound : dstep.result = u'
h_exhaustive :
  ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustiveCondition α nt G u v
    (ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound)
h_constructor_cfd : cfd = ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.step α nt G u u' v dstep derivation sound
rightSide : Word ({ x // x ∈ G.V } ⊕ { x // x ∈ G.Z }) := (↑dstep.prod).rhs
allChildren : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_2 α nt G u v cfd u' dstep sound
    (fun derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }))
    derivation h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd (fun h_same h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor => [])
    fun u'' dstep' derivation' sound' h_exhaustive h_constructor_cfd h_constructor =>
    have u'_comp := ⋯;
    have derivation_exhaustive :=
      ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.exhaustive_imp_child_exhaustive α nt G u v cfd h_exhaustive u' dstep
        derivation sound ⋯;
    collectDerivationTreeNodes derivation derivation_exhaustive ⋯
u_comp✝ : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
var_len_1 : (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len = 1
pre_len_less_u_len : dstep.pre.len < u.len
u_comp : dstep.pre.len + (Word.mk [Sum.inl (↑dstep.prod).lhs]).len + dstep.suf.len = u.len
suf_len_less_u_len : dstep.suf.len < u.len
leftOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.pre.len, ⋯⟩
rightOfVarCount : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u.len } := ⟨dstep.suf.len, ⋯⟩
rhs_symbol_count : ℕ := (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
u'_eq_result : dstep.result = u'
n : ℕ
h_num_vars_rhs : (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len = n + 1
h_rhs_non_empty : 1 ≤ (↑dstep.prod).rhs.len
h_u_vs_u'_len : u'.len = u.len + (rhs_symbol_count - 1)
h_u_vs_u'_len₂ : u.len ≤ u'.len
u_range_subset_u'_range : Finset.range u.len ⊆ Finset.range u'.len
leftOfVarCount₂ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } := ⟨↑leftOfVarCount, ⋯⟩
index₁ : { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
h_index_valid : ∃ location ∈ allChildren, location.2 = index₁
afunc : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) →
  G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len } → List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) :=
  fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
afuncDef :
  afunc = fun prev x =>
    @ContextFreeGrammar.ContextFreeDerivation.collectDerivationTreeNodes.match_3 α nt G u'
      (fun x => List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) x fun DT index₂ =>
      if h_is : index₁ = index₂ then prev ++ [(DT, index₂)] else prev
a : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }) := List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
aDef : a = List.foldl afunc [] allChildren
head₁ : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail₁ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
head₂ : G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len }
tail₂ : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })
ind_hyp₂ :
  (tail₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc tail₁ tail₂ ≠ []) → head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc (head₁ :: tail₁) tail₂ ≠ []
ind_hyp₁ : tail₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc tail₁ (head₂ :: tail₂) ≠ []
h_head_tail_neq_nil : head₁ :: tail₁ ≠ []
h_pos₂ : tail₂ ≠ []
h_neg₁ : ¬tail₁ ≠ []
⊢ List.foldl afunc (head₁ :: tail₁) (head₂ :: tail₂) ≠ []

proof:
have h_mono : ∀ l z, z ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc z l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l z hz; induction l generalizing z with
                      | nil => exact hz
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih; simp [afuncDef]; split_ifs <;> simp [hz]
                    apply h_mono; simp
failed_attempts:
have hf : ∀ l p, p ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc p l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l; induction l <;> intro p hp
                      · simp [hp]
                      · rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih; rw [afuncDef]; repeat split <;> simp [hp]
                    apply hf (head₂ :: tail₂) (head₁ :: tail₁) h_head_tail_neq_nil

induction tail₂ generalizing head₂ head₁ tail₁ with
                    | nil => simp [afunc]; split <;> simp [h_head_tail_neq_nil]
                    | cons x xs ih =>
                      rw [List.foldl_cons]
                      match h_p : afunc (head₁ :: tail₁) head₂ with
                      | h :: t => exact ih x h t (by simp)
                      | [] => simp [afunc] at h_p; split at h_p <;> simp [h_head_tail_neq_nil] at h_p

have mono : ∀ {l₁ l₂}, l₁ ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc l₁ l₂ ≠ [] := by
                      intro l₁ l₂; induction l₂ generalizing l₁
                      case nil => intro; simp
                      case cons x xs ih =>
                        intro h; rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih
                        cases x; simp [afunc]; split <;> simp [h]
                    exact mono h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_nonempty : ∀ l acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l; induction l with | nil => simp | cons x xs ih => intro acc h_acc; simp [List.foldl]; apply ih; rw [afuncDef]; cases x; simp; split <;> (simp; exact h_acc)
                    apply h_nonempty _ _ h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h (acc l) (ha : acc ≠ []) : List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      induction l generalizing acc <;> simp [afuncDef]
                      intro; repeat split <;> (simp; assumption)
                    exact h _ _ h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_f : ∀ l p, p ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc p l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l; induction l with
                      | nil => intro p hp; exact hp
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intro p hp; rw [List.foldl]; apply ih
                        rw [afuncDef]; cases x; split <;> (intro h; cases p; contradiction; cases h)
                    apply h_f; exact h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h : ∀ l p, p ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc p l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l; induction l with
                      | nil => intro p hp; exact hp
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intro p hp; rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih
                        rw [afuncDef]; rcases x with ⟨DT, idx⟩; split <;> simp [hp]
                    apply h; exact h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_mon : ∀ L xs, L ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc L xs ≠ [] := by
                      intro L xs hL
                      induction xs generalizing L
                      case nil => exact hL
                      case cons x xs ih =>
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih
                        rw [afuncDef]; cases x; simp; split <;> (simp; assumption)
                    apply h_mon (head₁ :: tail₁) (head₂ :: tail₂) h_head_tail_neq_nil

induction tail₂ generalizing head₁ tail₁
                    case nil =>
                      simp [List.foldl, afuncDef]; split <;> split <;> simp [h_head_tail_neq_nil]
                    case cons h_t t_t ih_t =>
                      simp [List.foldl, afuncDef]; apply ih_t; split <;> split <;> simp [h_head_tail_neq_nil]

have h l acc : acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      induction l generalizing acc <;> simp [List.foldl]
                      intro ha; apply ih; rw [afuncDef]; split <;> simp [ha]
                    apply h; simp

induction tail₂ generalizing head₂ head₁ tail₁ with
                    | nil => simp [List.foldl, afuncDef]; split <;> simp [h_head_tail_neq_nil]
                    | cons _ _ ih => simp [List.foldl]; apply ih; rw [afuncDef]; split <;> simp [h_head_tail_neq_nil]

have h_mono : ∀ l z, z ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc z l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l; induction l with
                      | nil => intro z hz => exact hz
                      | cons x xs ih => intro z hz; simp [List.foldl, afuncDef]; cases x; split <;> apply ih <;> simp [hz]
                    exact h_mono (head₂ :: tail₂) (head₁ :: tail₁) h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_foldl_ne_nil {l p} (hp : p ≠ []) : List.foldl afunc p l ≠ [] := by
                      induction l generalizing p with
                      | nil => exact hp
                      | cons x xs ih => exact ih (by rw [afuncDef]; cases x; split <;> simp [*])
                    apply h_foldl_ne_nil h_head_tail_neq_nil

generalize h_z : head₁ :: tail₁ = z
                    have hz : z ≠ [] := h_z ▸ h_head_tail_neq_nil
                    induction tail₂ generalizing z head₂ with
                    | nil => rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]; cases head₂; split <;> simp [hz]
                    | cons head₃ tail₃ ih => rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih; rw [afuncDef]; cases head₂; split <;> simp [hz]

have h_acc : ∀ l acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l; induction l with
                      | nil => intros; assumption
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intros acc h_ne; rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih
                        rw [afuncDef]; split <;> simp [h_ne]
                    apply h_acc (head₂ :: tail₂) (head₁ :: tail₁) h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_monotone : ∀ l p, p ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc p l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l; induction l
                      case nil => simp
                      case cons h t ih =>
                        intro p hp; rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih
                        rw [afuncDef]; repeat split <;> simp [hp]
                    exact h_monotone (head₂ :: tail₂) (head₁ :: tail₁) h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_foldl : ∀ l list, l ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc l list ≠ [] := by
                      intro l list hl
                      induction list generalizing l
                      case nil => exact hl
                      case cons h t ih =>
                        rw [List.foldl_cons, afuncDef]
                        apply ih
                        split <;> simp [hl]
                    exact h_foldl (head₁ :: tail₁) (head₂ :: tail₂) h_head_tail_neq_nil

simp at h_neg₁; rw [h_neg₁, List.foldl_cons]
                    have h_mono : ∀ l x, l ≠ [] → afunc l x ≠ [] := by
                      intro l x hl; rw [afuncDef]; cases x; split <;> simp [hl]
                    generalize h_l : afunc [head₁] head₂ = l
                    have hl : l ≠ [] := by rw [←h_l]; apply h_mono; simp
                    induction tail₂ generalizing l
                    case nil => exact hl
                    case cons h t ih => rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih; apply h_mono; exact hl
successful_attempts:
have h_mono : ∀ l z, z ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc z l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l z hz; induction l generalizing z with
                      | nil => exact hz
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih; simp [afuncDef]; split_ifs <;> simp [hz]
                    apply h_mono; simp

have h {l li} (hl : l ≠ []) : List.foldl afunc l li ≠ [] := by
                      induction li generalizing l
                      case nil => exact hl
                      case cons head tail ih =>
                        rw [List.foldl]; apply ih
                        rw [afuncDef]; cases head; simp; split <;> simp [hl]
                    exact h h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_f {l p} (hp : p ≠ []) : List.foldl afunc p l ≠ [] := by
                      induction l generalizing p
                      case nil => exact hp
                      case cons x xs ih =>
                        apply ih; cases x; cases p; contradiction
                        simp [afuncDef]; split <;> simp
                    exact h_f h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_foldl_ne : ∀ l acc, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l; induction l with
                      | nil => intros; assumption
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        intros acc acc_ne; rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih
                        cases x; simp [afuncDef]; split <;> simp [acc_ne]
                    apply h_foldl_ne; simp

have h_f : ∀ {z x}, z ≠ [] → afunc z x ≠ [] := by
                      intro z x hz; rw [afuncDef]; cases x; simp; split <;> simp [hz]
                    have h_fold : ∀ {L z}, z ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc z L ≠ [] := by
                      intro L; induction L with | nil => simp | cons h t ih => intro z hz; simp [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih (h_f hz)
                    apply h_fold h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_mono : ∀ acc xs, acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc xs ≠ [] := by
                      intro acc xs; induction xs generalizing acc
                      case nil => simp [List.foldl]
                      case cons x xs ih =>
                        intro h_acc; simp [List.foldl]; apply ih
                        cases x; simp [afuncDef]; split <;> simp [h_acc]
                    apply h_mono _ _ h_head_tail_neq_nil

have mono : ∀ l p, p ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc p l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l; induction l
                      case nil => intro p hp; exact hp
                      case cons h t ih =>
                        intro p hp; rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih
                        simp [afuncDef]; split <;> simp [hp]
                    apply mono (head₂ :: tail₂) (head₁ :: tail₁) h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_mono : ∀ ls l, l ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc l ls ≠ [] := by
                      intro ls l hl; induction ls generalizing l
                      case nil => simp [List.foldl]; exact hl
                      case cons x' xs' ih' =>
                        apply ih' (afunc l x')
                        rw [afuncDef]; cases x'; simp; split <;> simp [hl]
                    apply h_mono (head₂ :: tail₂) (head₁ :: tail₁) h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_mono {z l} (hz : z ≠ []) : List.foldl afunc z l ≠ [] := by induction l generalizing z with | nil => exact hz | cons x xs ih => rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih; rw [afuncDef]; dsimp; split <;> (cases z; contradiction; simp)
                    exact h_mono h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h_mono : ∀ l i, i ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc i l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l; induction l with
                      | nil => intro i hi; exact hi
                      | cons h_c t ih => intro i hi; rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih
                                         rw [afuncDef]; cases h_c; dsimp; split <;> simp [hi]
                    exact h_mono (head₂ :: tail₂) (head₁ :: tail₁) h_head_tail_neq_nil

have mono_foldl (l : List (DerivationTree G × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })) (acc) : acc ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc acc l ≠ [] := by
                      induction l generalizing acc
                      case nil => intro h; exact h
                      case cons h t ih =>
                        intro h_acc; rw [List.foldl_cons]; apply ih
                        cases h; simp [afuncDef]; split <;> simp [h_acc]
                    apply mono_foldl (head₂ :: tail₂) (head₁ :: tail₁) h_head_tail_neq_nil

have ih_foldl : ∀ (l l1 : List (G.DerivationTree × { x // x ∈ Finset.range u'.len })), l1 ≠ [] → List.foldl afunc l1 l ≠ [] := by
                      intro l; induction l with
                      | nil => intro l1 h; simp [List.foldl, h]
                      | cons head tail ih =>
                        intro l1 h; simp [List.foldl]; apply ih; cases head; simp [afuncDef]; split <;> simp [h]
                    apply ih_foldl (head₂ :: tail₂) (head₁ :: tail₁) h_head_tail_neq_nil

have h {xs L} (hL : L ≠ []) : List.foldl afunc L xs ≠ [] := by
                      induction xs generalizing L with
                      | nil => exact hL
                      | cons x xs ih =>
                        simp [List.foldl]; apply ih; cases x; simp [afuncDef]
                        split_ifs <;> (cases L; contradiction; simp)
                    exact h h_head_tail_neq_nil
